ptt.title: Voice PTT
ptt.httpsRequiredDescription: This page is being opened over a non-local HTTP address ({{origin}}). Browser security rules block the microphone and realtime voice transmit path here, so PTT transmit cannot be enabled.
ptt.httpsRequiredRoleBodyAdmin: Please enable HTTPS for this entrypoint, then reopen the app over HTTPS. On desktop builds you can enable browser HTTPS in System Settings; on server deployments configure a reverse-proxy certificate or a properly signed certificate.
ptt.httpsRequiredRoleBodyOperator: Your identity is already allowed to operate the radio, but this page is not a secure entrypoint. Ask an administrator to enable HTTPS, or reopen the app through an HTTPS URL before transmitting.
ptt.httpsRequiredRoleTitleViewer: You currently do not have transmit permission
ptt.httpsRequiredRoleBodyViewer: Even after HTTPS is fixed, a viewer identity still cannot transmit. Ask an administrator to handle both: enable HTTPS for this entrypoint and grant an identity that is allowed to transmit.
ptt.httpsRequiredBypassHint: If you have already manually allowed the relevant browser security restrictions for this page, you can remember that choice and close this warning first, then go back to the main PTT button and transmit again.

qso.title: Voice QSO Log
qso.name: Name
qso.noOperator: Please create an operator before logging QSO
qso.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The QSO record will be permanently deleted.

recentQSO.title: Recent QSOs
recentQSO.emptyHint: Logged voice QSOs will appear here
